title: Intake Process Canonical Schema
description: Canonical, snake_case JSON Schema for the Intake Process system. Provides x-graphql-* hints for automatic GraphQL SDL subgraph generation without altering the underlying structural semantics.

intake_process_record.description: Fetch a single Intake Process record by composite key (business_owner + system_owner) or source_record_id.

source_record_id.description: Direct source record identifier for precise lookup.

intake_process_records.description: Return a list of Intake Process records (non-paginated snapshot).

intake_process_record.description: Root Intake Process entity combining system metadata and Intake Process-specific extension data.

intake_process_specific.description: Domain-specific fields unique to Intake Process.

business_owner.description: Mirror of intake_process_specific.business_owner for federated key selection.

system_owner.description: Mirror of intake_process_specific.system_owner for federated key selection.

system_metadata.description: Metadata describing origin system, identifiers, and lifecycle timestamps.

source_record_id.description: Primary identifier of the record within Intake Process.

schema_version.description: Version of the canonical Intake Process schema.

ingested_at.description: Timestamp when this record was ingested into the data fabric.

last_modified.description: Timestamp when this record was last modified at source.

intake_process_specific_data.description: Primary business and pricing attributes specific to Intake Process.

unit_price.description: Unit price as stored in Intake Process.

unit_of_measure.description: Unit of measure description or code.

optional.description: Optional flag or descriptor captured as string in original system.

not_separately_priced.description: Indicates items not separately priced (raw representation).

performance_periods.description: Ordered list of performance periods (base + options if present).

intake_process_pricing_terms.description: Pricing term grouping (derived abstraction, non-structural change).

escalation_method.description: Method used for price escalation (if any).

billing_cycle.description: Billing cycle descriptor (monthly, quarterly, annual, etc.).

period_of_performance.description: Start and end dates defining a performance interval.

x-update-note: Initial canonical Intake Process schema with x-graphql hints for automated subgraph SDL generation.
